---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
labels: type:feat
---

## Problem
What user problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation before any solution.

## Proposal
What would you build? Sketch the user-facing surface (CLI flags, commands, output).

## Alternatives
Other approaches you considered, and why this one wins.

## Acceptance criteria
What does "done" look like? List the observable behaviors that close this issue.
